task.title: Build a Custom Docker Image with Plug-Ins Pre-Installed
task.shortdesc: Create a Dockerfile that extends the official DITA-OT image and pre-installs your plug-ins for faster CI builds and consistent toolchains.

context.p: DITA-OT explicitly documents creating a Dockerfile that uses the official image as a parent and runs dita --install to install plug-ins (from URL or registry).

step.cmd: Create a Dockerfile that installs plug-ins during image build.

info.codeblock:
FROM ghcr.io/dita-ot/dita-ot:4.4
# Option A: install from a remote ZIP RUN dita --install https://github.com/infotexture/dita-bootstrap/archive/master.zip
# Option B: install from dita-ot.org plugin registry # RUN dita --install org.dita-community.pdf-page-break

step.cmd: For private plug-ins, copy them into the image.

ul.li: COPY your plug-in ZIP into the image

info.p: This keeps CI fast and avoids downloading from private registries at runtime.
